prompt: Minimal modern logo mark incorporating the letter P for a tech SaaS product called Pinger. The P should feel geometric and clever — maybe the negative space forms a signal pulse, or the curve of the P suggests a radar arc, or the P is built from clean geometric shapes. Single dark color on white background. Ultra clean, professional. Think Figma, Notion, or Pinterest logo simplicity. No extra text, just the P mark.
